channel.title: Sdn on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Sdn on Pi Stack

item.title: OpenDaylight vs Faucet vs Ryu: Self-Hosted SDN Controllers Compared 2026
item.description: Software-Defined Networking (SDN) separates the control plane from the data plane, giving you centralized, programmable control over your entire network infrastructure. Instead of configuring each switch individually, an SDN controller manages flow rules across all devices from a single point.
